text.tspan: Searches of Kenner's Flock cameras: two Texas agencies vs. everyone else
​All 10,261,956 searches by 5,254 outside agencies that included Kenner's cameras, Jan 1 2024 - Jan 16 2026. Rectangle area = share of searches.​
​Ranks 1-100 are drawn individually (hover for exact numbers in the interactive version); the long tail is one block.​

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; fill: rgb(102, 102, 102); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre; pointer-events: all;
text.tspan: Source: this public record request (Flock audit logs Jan 2024 - Jan 16 2026, Kenner's own searches excluded): https://www.muckrock.com/foi/kenner-16256/public-records-request-flock-audits-201972/
More info on the methodology on github.com/eye-on-surveillance
